title: pasania lindleyana
intro: Pasania lindleyana, also known as East Indian rosewood, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pasania lindleyana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and show promise in treating various types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Pasania lindleyana include a decoction made from its bark, which is used to treat a range of ailments, and a tincture that can be taken to support overall well-being.
